description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ROS 2 CI that runs on pull requests to the ros2 and ros2/* branches. The workflow should have two jobs: test_environment running on macOS-latest and windows-latest for ROS 2 distributions dashing, eloquent, and foxy; and test_environment_linux running on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of ROS 2 distributions and Docker images. Each job should set up the ROS environment and run build and test steps.
